name: golang-github-pjbgf-sha1cd-dev
title: golang-github-pjbgf-sha1cd-dev
description:
SHA1 implementation with collision detection (library)
sha1cd is a Go implementation of SHA1 with counter-cryptanalysis, which
detects collision attacks. It can be used as a drop-in replacement for
crypto/sha1.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-pjbgf-sha1cd-dev because SHA1 implementation with collision detection (library).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-pjbgf-sha1cd-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-pjbgf-sha1cd-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-pjbgf-sha1cd-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
